Alchemy.description: Configuration for the Kraftvaerk Umbraco Alchemy package.

ChatProfileAlias.description: Alias of the Umbraco AI chat profile to use. When null the default chat profile is used.

ExperimentalButtons.description: Enables experimental inline brew buttons on property editors and content type headers.

Contexts.description: Context alias overrides for each AI feature.

UfmWriter.description: Context alias for UFM block label generation.

ContentTypeDescriptionWriter.description: Context alias for document type description generation.

PropertyTypeDescriptionWriter.description: Context alias for property description generation.
